task: Docs-only design spec for Finance Hub FH-8 (Lease Contract + Unit Picker, Legal<->Finance, reuses FH-7). Lease agreement created in the Legal module; a unit picker (FH-7 shared control, third caller alongside insurance + property tax) selects all units being leased into the contract, each with a lease amount + a contract total. On finalize, Finance generates the recurring monthly bill and the FH-7 per-unit allocation disburses cost per unit. Inter-company: TRK (lessor, owns units) -> TRANSP/USMCA (lessee); depreciation books at owner TRK, lease expense at lessee TRANSP, lease income at TRK; bill is TRANSP->TRK (consolidation eliminates). Data model (lease_contracts owner/lessee/total_monthly/document_ref, lease_contract_units = FH-7 allocation), monthly recurring bill (reuse FH-6 scheduler pattern), Legal-module reuse (extend existing apps/*/legal), screen (GUARD mocks, FH-7 styling), open questions, gated build sequence. Do NOT build a new unit picker. NO code, no DDL, no posting. VOID != DELETE. Flag LEASE_CONTRACT_BILLING_ENABLED default OFF. Designed live with Jorge + GUARD-verifies-vs-QuickBooks before merge.
